title: Arcana Kernel Method Status
subtitle: Which methods are implemented vs stubbed; demand-driven by KyberBot adoption
purpose: Tracks the demand-driven implementation trail. Each method is either stubbed (throws NotImplementedError) or implemented with a real body. The 'driven_by' field names the consumer module that triggered the implementation. The 'consumers' field captures each downstream system's integration state per method.

status_legend.label: Not in Arcana yet — identified gap, not even stubbed

consumer_state_legend.label: Consumer has its own impl; kernel exists; swap pending parity gate (ADR 009)
Consumer wraps the kernel call (logging, scoping, etc.) — counts as wired
Consumer wants this but blocked (kernel stub or missing prerequisites)
Method exists but this consumer has no use for it

consumers_tracked.label: KyberBot
consumers_tracked.status: active adoption — arcana-adoption branch, 22 commits, 724 tests

consumers_tracked.label: KyberAgent Desktop
consumers_tracked.status: not yet adopting; 5 schema gaps identified; codebase in flux (TCP auth, tunnels, SSE proxy just added) — adopt after stabilisation

consumers_tracked.label: Kyber in Cloud
consumers_tracked.status: blocked on shedding 5 Convex artifacts; needs arcana-provider-postgres before any swap; possible takeover scenario in play

methods.name: storeMemory
methods.scope_notes: canonical row write only; chunking/embedding/extraction deferred

kyber-in-cloud.notes: blocked on postgres provider + Convex shed

methods.name: hybridSearch
methods.scope_notes: Wave-1 KyberBot-parity result shape (semanticScore, keywordScore, graphScore, matchType). RRF (k=60) fusion over keyword (FTS5) + semantic (VectorStore) + graph (BFS via getNeighbors). Optional reranker. Per-channel failures degrade gracefully.

kyberbot.notes: Swap pending parity gate per ADR 009. Result shape matches KyberBot's existing flat layout so adaptation is mechanical.

kyber-in-cloud.notes: Brain wants kernel-version directly (no legacy to regress against); blocked on postgres provider for FTS via tsvector

methods.name: factRetrieval
methods.scope_notes: structured-only text-match; scores by word-hit ratio; result shape upgraded to wave-1 (keyword/graph matchType). hybridSearch now exists alongside this — factRetrieval remains for the fact-aware multi-stage path.

methods.name: getEntityProfile
methods.scope_notes: assembles from live facts/insights/neighbors; stores result; returns from storage on second call; QueryResult envelope

kyberbot.notes: consumer uses local profile generation; swap candidate

methods.name: queryFacts (asOf timeline)
methods.scope_notes: Optional asOf: string ISO-8601 param added to queryFacts AND StructuredStore.getFactsForEntity. Filters out facts where expiresAt ≤ asOf. Backward compatible — omitting asOf preserves prior behavior. libsql impl filters in SQL.

kyberbot.notes: no current timeline-query consumer in KyberBot

kyber-in-cloud.notes: core Brain migration requirement — Brain has temporal facts and needs bitemporal querying

methods.name: [StructuredStore.searchFulltext]
methods.scope_notes: New contract method on StructuredStore. libsql impl uses FTS5 virtual table (memories_fts, unicode61 tokenizer) with sync triggers on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE. Returns FulltextMatch[] with memoryId + normalized 0..1 score + matchedFields. Scope+tier filtering at the index layer. Postgres impl (future) will use tsvector @@ to_tsquery satisfying the same contract.

kyberbot.notes: KyberBot has its own FTS5 query — swap with hybridSearch swap

kyber-in-cloud.notes: blocked on arcana-provider-postgres impl of this method

methods.name: runSleepPipeline
methods.notes: 13-step pipeline; entirely stubbed. ADR 010 records the unresolved step-list reconciliation between KyberBot's 9 steps and Arcana's 13 (consolidate, observe). Implementation deferred to next sprint.

kyberbot.notes: 9-step pipeline in production; swap blocked on ADR 010 resolution + parity gate

methods.name: queryFacts
methods.driven_by: ADR 004 schema correction (in anticipation of KyberBot module #4 + Kyber in Cloud fact pipeline)
methods.notes: Reads via structured.getFactsForEntity; wraps in fresh QueryResult envelope. Sentence-form and triple-decomposed facts both queryable. Now accepts optional asOf for bitemporal filtering (added 2026-05-20).

methods.name: getNeighbors
methods.notes: Thin facade over structured.getNeighbors; wraps in QueryResult envelope. Provider-level method was already implemented.

methods.name: listContradictions
methods.notes: Thin facade over structured.listContradictions; respects optional status filter. Provider-level method was already implemented.

methods.name: listInsights
methods.notes: Thin facade over structured.listInsights; respects optional entityId filter. Provider-level method was already implemented.

methods.name: deleteEntity
methods.notes: added deleteEntity to StructuredStore interface as part of this work (ADR 002)

methods.name: recordFact
methods.notes: Validates RecordFactInput via FactSchema; builds Fact with UUID id + ISO createdAt + isLatest=true defaults. Auto-supersession deferred to sleep pipeline.

methods.name: updateMemory
methods.notes: Partial update; contentHash recomputed when content changes; scopes replaced not merged.

methods.name: storeContradiction
methods.notes: Kernel mints id + createdAt; status defaults 'pending' (ADR 006).

summary.arcana_config_merge: arcana-config package DELETED 2026-05-19; merged into arcana-core src/config/.
summary.fts_hybridsearch_sprint: Sprint 2026-05-20 landed: searchFulltext contract + libsql FTS5 impl + kernel hybridSearch (RRF k=60) + queryFacts asOf + ADR 009 (parity gate) + ADR 010 (sleep step gap). KyberBot untouched per ADR 009 deferred-swap principle.
summary.easy_facade_sprint: Follow-on sprint 2026-05-20 (v0.2.1) landed: getNeighbors + listContradictions + listInsights kernel facades (thin wrappers over already-implemented provider methods). Tier 2 audits run in parallel: (a) FTS5 syntax-injection audit — clean, 10KB input cap added defensively; (b) hybridSearch vs KyberBot parity cross-check — shape parity holds, channel topology diverges (Arcana 3-channel vs KyberBot 4-channel), top-N overlap expected 60–75% on parity test, documented in docs/plans/2026-05-20-tier1-tier2-facades-and-audits.md.
summary.parity_harness_sprint: v0.3.0 sprint 2026-05-20 landed: runParityHarness shared utility in @kybernesis/arcana-testkit/parity — the comparison engine required by ADR 009 for any consumer swap. Generic top-N overlap test with configurable threshold + per-query diff tracking + error capture. 11 new tests. Unblocks the KyberBot hybrid-search swap (whenever KyberBot brings fixtures + invokes the harness).
summary.delivery_review_status: CONDITIONAL PASS r2 (2026-05-20). EC-015 in-flight guard needed before merge. 4 KyberBot-side patches still remaining.
contracts_ahead_of_kernel: expiresAt — now surfaced via queryFacts asOf (2026-05-20)
surprisalScore — still unreachable; lands with sleep pipeline
lastReinforcedAt — still unreachable; lands with sleep pipeline
providers_planned: arcana-provider-postgres (Brain migration blocker; FTS via tsvector to satisfy searchFulltext contract)
brain_migration_blockers: 5 Convex artifacts to shed (4-flat-ID edges, shadow rows, _creationTime, reactive queries, loose enum vocab)
possible Brain takeover scenario — central vs distributed migration shape TBD
contract_evolutions: v0.x ADR 002: deleteEntity added to StructuredStore
v0.x ADR 004: FactSchema corrected — fact (sentence) required, attribute/value optional
v0.x ADR 005: updateMemory added — Memory is not append-only
v0.x ADR 006: markFactSuperseded + storeContradiction; Contradiction.rationale added
v0.x ADR 008: Brain migration boundary; identified timeline query as missing
v0.x ADR 009 (2026-05-20): Parity gate methodology for consumer swaps
v0.x ADR 010 (2026-05-20): Sleep pipeline step reconciliation — deferred design decision
v0.x 2026-05-20: StructuredStore.searchFulltext added; getFactsForEntity accepts asOf
